name: Family French Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Vegetable Oil or Salad Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all of the ingredients in a jar.
2. Cover; shake vigorously.
3. Chill to blend flavors for about 2 hours.
4. Remove the garlic before serving.
5. Shake again just before serving.
Makes 1 1/4 cups of dressing.
